mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes the logged chunk-type comparand 'IHDR' into a second chunk-type position, manufacturing a duplicate IHDR chunk that re-enters png_handle_IHDR with PNG_HAVE_IHDR already set; VP alone cannot place the exact 4-byte literal.
one_line: I2S inserts duplicate 'IHDR' chunk-type to trigger PNG_HAVE_IHDR mode bit

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace logs the (length, 32) compare operands and splices a non-32 length into the cHRM chunk's 4-byte length field; VP's distance-bucket feedback alone cannot flip the length away from 32.
one_line: I2S substitutes non-32 cHRM chunk length to satisfy length != 32 guard

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace logs the chunk-type CMP against 'pHYs' and splices those 4 bytes at offset 0x25-0x28, manufacturing the dispatch condition that causes png_handle_pHYs to run and expose the length != 9 gate; VP cannot place the exact FOURCC by chance.
one_line: I2S places 'pHYs' FOURCC to dispatch handler where length != 9 gate lives

mechanism_summary: value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace logs the byte compared at name[0]==':' and splices ':' (0x3a) into the matching input position; pure CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback in value_profile cannot synthesize a single-byte equality against a constant.
one_line: I2S injects ':' as first QName byte; VP gradient cannot reach it

mechanism_summary: vpc's I2SRandReplace copies the parser's expected comparison operands (scheme/port/HTTP-token) directly into the input, manufacturing the structured URL bytes that drive execution to multi_done with result==0 and nonzero rc; vp's distance feedback alone cannot climb to these literals within budget.
one_line: I2S plants scheme/port/HTTP literals to reach multi_done with zero result

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes scheme/host literal bytes from CMP operands into the input, synthesizing a valid scheme://host:port URL that causes an FTP-family handler to set wildcardmatch=TRUE.
one_line: I2S plants scheme+authority literals so wildcardmatch is set true

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes scheme-comparison operands ('pop3') directly at input offsets 0x06-0x09, synthesizing a valid scheme prefix that causes the URL parser to set wildcardmatch=TRUE.
one_line: I2S substitutes 'pop3' scheme literal so wildcardmatch is set
